docket_entries.description: MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NASIR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR FEB-19-1998 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 624 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON FEB-25-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

M8/#624, COMM S KAPLAN, CSR L ESPINOSA, CLK H HAMILTON CASE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE, SETTLED AS FOLLOWS: STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDMENT FOR RESTITUTION OF PREMISES 2048 POLK ST. #200 STAYED TO 3-31-98 AT NOON. IF DEFT VACATES BY 3-31-98, PLAINTIFF WILL WAIVE ALL RENT, DAMAGES, & COSTS & DISMISS W/PREJ. IF DEFT FAILS TO COMPLY, PLTF TO HAVE JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFT FOR RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AND $300. RENT AND DAMAGES @ $14.28 PER DAY FROM 1-25-98, + COSTS. DEFENDANT TO FILE DISMISSAL.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT MITCHELL, KIRK
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT MITCHELL, KIRK ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT MITCHELL, KIRK ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NASIR AS TO DEFENDANT MITCHELL, KIRK SUMMONS ISSUED
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT MITCHELL, KIRK ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT MITCHELL, KIRK
